scripts.predev: node -e "const cp=require('child_process');const r=cp.execSync('netstat -ano',{encoding:'utf8'});const m=r.match(/TCP\s+[^\s]+:3000\s+[^\s]+\s+LISTENING\s+(\d+)/);if(m){cp.execSync('taskkill /F /PID '+m[1]);console.log('Killed PID '+m[1]+' on port 3000')}else{console.log('Port 3000 is free')};"
